description: Contracts-as-data: real boundaries in SpeechAngel where a change on one side must be mirrored on the other. The classifier (scripts/workflow/classify.mjs) matches changed paths against `patterns` (JS regex, tested against each path) and surfaces the followUps. Advisory, not a hard gate. Author entries from boundaries you ACTUALLY trip (meta Wave 6).

contracts.title: Always-on microphone foreground service ↔ AndroidManifest service-type sync
contracts.description: A microphone foreground service must declare foregroundServiceType="microphone" AND the FOREGROUND_SERVICE_MICROPHONE permission in its AndroidManifest. Touching a service or the manifest means both sides must stay in sync (research/04_build_and_reuse_plan.md §1 CAPTURE layer).

contracts.title: New dependency ↔ version-catalog entry (no hardcoded coordinates, no dynamic versions)
contracts.description: Every dependency goes through gradle/libs.versions.toml — never a hardcoded "group:artifact:version" in a module build.gradle.kts, and never a dynamic version (+, latest.release, SNAPSHOT). Touching a build file or the catalog means re-running the reproducibility gates.

followUps.label: Verify all deps go through the catalog
Verify no dynamic versions in the catalog

contracts.title: Incident note ↔ knowledge-index closure
contracts.description: Adding or editing an incident under docs/errors/ means the learning loop must be closed: required sections filled, prevention links real, index regenerated. Otherwise knowledge:check blocks the commit.
